pistol.prompt: Sound effect: a single 9mm pistol gunshot, dry close-mic recording, sharp crack with a very short tail. Repeat the identical single shot eight times with two full seconds of total silence between each shot. No music, no melody, no drums, no reverb wash, no background ambience.

smg.prompt: Sound effect: a single shot from a small 9mm submachine gun, tight snappy mechanical crack, dry close-mic, very short tail. Repeat the identical single shot eight times with two full seconds of total silence between each shot. No bursts, no music, no melody, no drums, no background ambience.

rifle.prompt: Sound effect: a single powerful high-caliber sniper rifle gunshot, deep booming crack with a short echo tail. Repeat the identical single shot six times with three full seconds of total silence between each shot. No music, no melody, no drums, no background ambience.

ak.prompt: Sound effect: a single AK-47 assault rifle gunshot, aggressive punchy metallic crack, dry close-mic, short tail. Repeat the identical single shot eight times with two full seconds of total silence between each shot. No bursts, no music, no melody, no drums, no background ambience.

Repeat the identical launch five times with three full seconds of total silence between each launch. No explosion at the end, no music, no melody, no drums.
